_comment: LAMP Words for Life Level-2 Verb Sub-Pages. Each sub-page is accessed by pressing the corresponding core VERB on the home grid. Structure follows authentic LAMP WFL 'Action Man' pattern: r1c1=Action Man (base verb, speaks+returns), r1c2=+s form, r1c3=-ing form, r1c4=-ed/past form, then related nouns in orange. After any selection the app auto-returns to home.
